# Kitchen Reno Brisbane - Custom Kitchen Cabinets Guide

## Business
Name: Kitchen Reno Brisbane
Site: https://www.kitchenrenobrisbane.com.au
Description: Custom kitchen cabinets Brisbane specialist offering full renovation services

## This Page
Title: Custom Kitchen Cabinets Brisbane: A Complete Guide
URL: https://sitesau.github.io/custom-kitchen-cabinets-brisbane/
Topic: Custom kitchen cabinetry for Brisbane homeowners
Last updated: May 2026

## Services Covered
- Custom cabinetry (flat-pack, rigid-box, fully custom)
- Cabinet materials (MR particleboard, plywood, HDF)
- Door profiles and finishes (shaker, slab, two-pack polyurethane, thermofoil, veneer)
- Storage solutions (pull-out pantry, deep drawers, integrated bins)

## Location
Brisbane, Queensland, Australia
Service areas: Northside, Southside, Inner Brisbane, Ipswich, Logan, Redlands

## Key Facts
- Custom kitchen cabinet costs: $8,000 to $30,000+ (cabinetry only)
- QBCC licence required for work over $3,300
- Lead times: 8 to 14 weeks for fully custom work
- Climate note: MR-grade particleboard minimum for Brisbane humidity

## Contact
Website: https://www.kitchenrenobrisbane.com.au
Email: info@kitchenrenobrisbane.com.au
